report_text_raw: Spirometry: FEV1 72% predicted, FEV1/FVC ratio 0.74. SpO2 97% on room air. Mild airflow limitation consistent with mild-moderate asthma.
Repeat spirometry: FEV1 decreased to 65% predicted, FEV1/FVC 0.70. SpO2 95% on room air. Worsening vs January. Post-bronchodilator FEV1 improved to 78% confirming reversibility.
Spirometry: FEV1 48% predicted (GOLD Stage III range), FEV1/FVC 0.58 post-bronchodilator. Severe fixed airflow obstruction. SpO2 93% at rest on room air.
Acute exacerbation labs: SpO2 91% on room air (critical). WBC 11.2 mild leukocytosis. CRP 28 mg/L elevated. Sputum culture pending. No ABG performed.
CBC: WBC 14.2 leukocytosis. CRP 85 mg/L markedly elevated. Procalcitonin 0.8 ng/mL moderately elevated. SpO2 93% on room air. CXR: right lower lobe consolidation.
